fields.description: Discount or promotion notes, such as spend threshold discounts.

evidence.note: User-supplied 53-page PDF sample with extractable Chinese/English catalogue tables, last-update labels, wholesale prices, retail prices, package sizes, and units per case.
Supplier identity supplied by user; numeric Rosetta supplier id was not present in the clean checkout.

known_ambiguities.condition: The sample identifies Kangaroo/KPN, but this clean checkout has no numeric supplier id for it.
known_ambiguities.review_guidance: Import or supply the Rosetta supplier id before selecting this contract in runtime ingestion.

known_ambiguities.condition: The supplied mixed catalogue contains several table shapes with per-unit and per-case labels.
known_ambiguities.review_guidance: Create representative row fixtures per section before promoting to SUPPORTED.

requires_validation_issue_when: The qualifying product set or spend basis is not explicit.

interpretation_rules: Treat Unit Per Case as case configuration only unless supplier ordering rules prove it is an order multiple.
Do not use size/content text as sellable-unit count.
unresolved_semantics: Purchase UOM and break-pack permission are not proven by the source sample alone.

pricing.notes: Source headers say Price Per Unit/Wholesale Price Per Unit, but individual table variants need parser fixtures before production use.

row_eligibility_rules: Rows with a SKU/product code and wholesale price are candidate catalogue rows.

table_regions.name: mixed_wholesale_retail_tables
table_regions.notes: The supplied PDF contains several table variants; this declaration captures the shared source concepts without assuming one parser layout.
table_regions.selector: Chinese/English tables with SKU#, Product Description, Size, Unit Per Case, Wholesale Price Per Unit, Retail Price Per Unit

validation_rules.description: Wholesale should be below recommended retail when both are present.

evidence.note: User-supplied 53-page PDF sample with extractable Chinese/English catalogue tables, last-update labels, wholesale prices, retail prices, package sizes, and units per case.

validation_rules.review_guidance: Check whether the wholesale and retail columns were swapped before approving the item.
